chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-529 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case 03.02.2025 Petitioner No.1 present in person. Mr. Muhammad Khan Bajeer advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Kaleemullah Memon Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Dili Jan PS Qasimabad and ASI Allah Jurio PS Badin. -.-.-. The Petitioner No.1 is present in person who points out that the Petitioner got divorce from her first husband and contracted second marriage with Petitioner No.2. She further states that based on indecent photographs and fake videos, the Petitioners are being harassed, threatened and blackmailed against which complaint was lodged with the FIA Cyber Crime Wing Hyderabad. Even thereafter another fake video of Petitioner No.1 was posted on media and a press conference was also held at Badin by the private Respondents. In addition to the above, on 16.09.2024 theft was committed at the house of the petitioners, and despite timely complaint, no action has been taken by Respondent No.6. Since FIA was not taking any action, the petitioners filed Criminal Miscellaneous Application on which recoding of statement of the petitioners was ordered. Further states that despite the above series of harassment and threats being caused, police is not providing protection to them. Conversely, reports from SSP Badin, SSP Hyderabad and SHO PS Qasimabad have been filed which are taken on record. Learned AAG states that as per Reports the police is ready to provide protection to the petitioners as and when they approach the police.

Conversely, reports from SSP Badin, SSP Hyderabad and SHO PS Qasimabad have been filed which are taken on record. Learned AAG states that as per Reports the police is ready to provide protection to the petitioners as and when they approach the police. The Petitioner No.1 being satisfied with the above statement, the Petition stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
